name: Secret in Code Detection & Response
description: Automated response workflow for secrets detected in source code repositories. When a secret scanner detects API keys, passwords, tokens, or other credentials committed to code, Riggs AI assesses the exposure risk, triggers immediate credential rotation, removes the secret from the repository history, and notifies the responsible team.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: GitHub
required_integrations.reason: Remove secrets from repository and create PRs for remediation

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for secret exposure tracking and remediation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Immediately notify the security team and credential owner about exposed secrets

data.title: Secret Detected in Code
data.summary: Triggers when a secret scanner finds credentials committed to a repository

config.description: Ingests secret detection alerts from GitLeaks, TruffleHog, GitHub Secret Scanning, or GitGuardian

data.title: AI Exposure Risk Assessment
data.summary: Riggs AI evaluates the severity and blast radius of the exposed secret

config.additional_instructions: Assess the exposed secret: determine the credential type (API key, password, token, private key), whether the repo is public or private, how long the secret has been exposed, the blast radius if exploited, and whether the credential grants access to production systems.
config.description: AI-powered assessment of secret exposure risk and blast radius

data.title: Public Repository?
data.summary: Check if the secret was exposed in a public repository (highest risk)

data.title: Emergency: Rotate Credential
data.summary: Immediately rotate the exposed credential to prevent unauthorized access

config.message: EMERGENCY ROTATION: {{trigger-1.alert.secret_type}} exposed in public repo {{trigger-1.alert.repository}}. Rotating immediately.
config.description: Immediately rotate the exposed credential without waiting for approval

data.title: Alert Security Team — Critical
data.summary: Send critical alert to security team about public secret exposure

data.title: Create Incident Ticket
data.summary: Create a security incident ticket for the secret exposure

config.description: Create a security incident ticket for tracking the secret exposure response

data.title: Rotate Credential (Private Repo)
data.summary: Rotate the exposed credential from the private repository

config.description: Rotate the credential with approval since it's in a private repository

data.title: Notify Developer
data.summary: Notify the committer about the secret in their commit

data.title: Update Alert Status
data.summary: Mark the alert as remediated after rotation and notification

config.note: Secret rotated, team notified, incident ticket created. Git history cleanup may still be pending.

data.title: End — Secret Remediated
data.summary: Secret detection response complete — credential rotated and teams notified

config.summary: Exposed secret detected, credential rotated, teams notified, incident ticket created.
